title: fix(hunch): drive LLM synthesis from the Claude subscription, never the API
context:
Claude Code auth precedence puts ANTHROPIC_API_KEY above subscription OAuth and
always uses it in headless `-p` mode, so the old provider chain (anthropic-sdk ->
claude-cli -> deterministic) silently billed the pay-per-token API whenever a key
was in the env. Make subscription the only LLM path:

- Remove the @anthropic-ai/sdk provider; chain is now claude-cli -> deterministic.
- Strip ANTHROPIC_API_KEY/ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN from the spawned `claude` env so it
  falls through to subscription OAut
decision: Changed src/cli, src/synthesis: removed AnthropicProvider; new dep(s): node:os.
consequences: Removes AnthropicProvider — potential breaking change for callers.
